general.name: manga_firefly-STELLARPOP
general.short: manga-firefly-v2_4_3-GLOBALPROP.fits is one of the MaNGA FIREFLY catalogues for the the 15th data release of the Sloan Digital Sky Survey.
general.description:
manga-firefly-v2_4_3-GLOBALPROP.fits is one of the MaNGA FIREFLY catalogues for the the 15th data release of the Sloan Digital Sky Survey. The file contains analysis for 4675 galaxies from the MaNGA survey, providing global properties such as gradients and absorption. For DR15, the version of FIREFLY used was FIREFLY_VER=v1_1_0, and this was run on MANGADRP_VER=v2_4_3 reduced data. The catalogue is available in FITS format at the following link:
https://data.sdss.org/sas/dr15/manga/spectro/firefly/v1_1_2/manga_firefly-v2_4_3-STELLARPOP.fits
Naming Convention
filename = manga_firefly-MANGADRP_VER-STELLARPOP.fits where MANGADRP_VER=v2_4_3 for DR15 .
Approximate Size
2 GB
File Type
FITS
Read by Products
firefly
Written by Products
firefly
Sections

This should contain internal links to parts of the file (if any).

  • HDU0: The Primary Header
  • HDU1: A Data Table
  • Examples

surveys.name: MaNGA
surveys.long: Mapping Nearby Galaxies at Apache Point Observatory
surveys.description: A wide-field optical spectroscopic IFU survey of extragalactic sources to study galaxy dynamics and kinematics

general.naming_convention: $MANGA_FIREFLY/[FIREFLY_VER]/manga_firefly-[DRPVER]-STELLARPOP.fits where FIREFLY_VER=v1_1_2 in DR15 and DRPVER=v2_4_3.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another
